CONTENT.Club career: Having played in their youth side for four years, Busk was promoted to the first team of F.C. Copenhagen during the 2012–13 season. He gained his first Superliga game on 16 May 2013, an away match against Randers FC. In the Autumn of 2014, Busk was sent out on loan to fellow Superliga club AC Horsens, and the following year had a spell with Sandefjord.Busk moved to German 2. Bundesliga side Union Berlin in January 2016.On 14 May 2024, newly promoted Sønderjyske announced the signing of Busk from 1. July 2024. He signed a two-years contract.
CONTENT.External links: Jakob Busk at WorldFootball.netJakob Busk national team profile at the Danish Football Association (in Danish)

SUMMARY: Jakob Busk Jensen (born 12 September 1993) is a Danish footballer who plays as goalkeeper for Danish Superliga club Sønderjyske.
